title: MailerLite vs Buttondown (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare MailerLite and Buttondown email marketing tools. See pricing, features, and which is best for your needs.
intro: MailerLite and Buttondown are both popular freemium email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences. MailerLite is a feature-rich, visual-first tool ideal for small businesses and e-commerce, while Buttondown caters to developers and writers who prefer markdown and simplicity. This comparison will help you determine which platform aligns best with your needs.

comparison_table.tool_a: Landing pages, pop-ups, surveys, e-commerce integrations
comparison_table.tool_b: API access, paid subscriptions, developer-friendly, multiple newsletters

choose_a_if: You want a generous free tier with 1,000 subscribers to test the platform
You need e-commerce integrations, landing pages, or advanced marketing tools
You prefer visual, drag-and-drop editing over writing in markdown
You're interested in an affiliate program to earn recurring commissions
choose_b_if: You're a developer or technical writer comfortable with markdown syntax
You want to offer paid subscriptions to your newsletter subscribers
You need direct API access to build custom integrations
You prefer a minimalist, distraction-free writing experience
You plan to run multiple separate newsletters from one account

faq.a: It depends on your use case. MailerLite is better for small businesses needing e-commerce and marketing features, while Buttondown excels for developers and writers who prioritize simplicity and markdown support. MailerLite offers more features overall, but Buttondown has slightly higher customer ratings and a more specialized focus.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, MailerLite or Buttondown?
faq.a: Both platforms start at $9/month for paid plans, making them equally affordable. However, MailerLite's free tier supports 1,000 subscribers compared to Buttondown's 100, giving MailerLite better value for testing and growing your audience at no cost.

faq.q: Can I switch from Buttondown to MailerLite?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms support import and export functionality. Buttondown explicitly lists import/export as a key feature, making migration straightforward. You can export your subscriber list and email content from Buttondown and import them into MailerLite without significant data loss.
